text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Actually, my heart's been pounding for a while.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It's going wild, like I just finished a really intense
workout.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... I'm starting to feel a little unsure. Does
that mean I haven't trained enough?
choice_data_list: It's only proof that you're fired up for today.
It's only proof that you're fired up for today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huh... So that's why my heart's been pounding?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Then that means... my legs aren't shaking just
because I'm scared. They're shaking because...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: They're really excited and ready to go!
choice_data_list: Right! Now get out there and have some fun!
